texto: There's nothing giggly about Heather usually. She's the opposite
autor: hanging out with her is like sitting in an empty church. That's why I like her. She's quiet and serious and a thousand years old and seems like she can talk to the wind.
explicacao: Citação de hanging out with her is like sitting in an empty church. That's why I like her. She's quiet and serious and a thousand years old and seems like she can talk to the wind. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “There's nothing giggly about Heather usually. She's the opposite” articula reflexao, jandy-nelson, i-ll-give-you-the-sun em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como i-ll-give-you-the-sun.
